# Boss Queens Collection — Full Product & Store Information

> Premium 100% human hair wigs, bundles, frontals and accessories. Founded in St. Maarten, Caribbean. Ships worldwide.

## About Us

Boss Queens Collection was founded in St. Maarten — a Caribbean island of just 37 square miles — with a bold vision: to make premium, 100% human hair accessible to queens everywhere. We source only the finest virgin hair from around the world and deliver it straight to your doorstep. Our mission is simple: top quality, affordable luxury, worldwide.

## Why Choose Boss Queens Collection

1. **100% Human Hair**: No synthetic blends — only premium virgin hair
2. **Affordable Luxury**: Premium quality at prices that won't break the bank
3. **Global Shipping**: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $100
4. **Caribbean Heritage**: Founded with island love and dedication to every queen
5. **Grade 10A Quality**: The highest grade of virgin human hair available
6. **Versatile Styling**: Can be dyed, bleached, curled, and straightened

## Product Categories

### Wigs
- **Lace Front Wigs**: Premium HD lace for an invisible hairline. Available in 13x4 and 13x6 frontal options.
- **Bob Wigs**: Short, stylish blunt-cut bob wigs. Pre-plucked with baby hair.
- **Headband Wigs**: Easy-to-wear wigs with attached headband. No glue or lace needed. Perfect for beginners.
- **Colored Wigs**: Honey blonde (#27), burgundy wine (#99J), ombre styles. Pre-colored virgin hair.

### Hair Bundles
- **Brazilian Body Wave**: Soft, bouncy S-pattern waves. Most popular texture.
- **Brazilian Straight**: Silky smooth, bone straight texture.
- **Brazilian Water Wave**: Loose, flowing wave pattern resembling beach waves.
- **Peruvian Deep Wave**: Tight, defined curl pattern with lots of volume.
- **Indian Loose Wave**: Soft, romantic loose waves with natural movement.
- **Malaysian Kinky Curly**: Tight, springy curls that blend with natural 3C/4A hair.
- **Vietnamese Bone Straight**: Ultra-straight, thick, and glossy.

### Frontals & Closures
- **13x4 HD Lace Frontal**: Ear-to-ear coverage with invisible HD lace.
- **4x4 Closure**: Natural part with minimal lace.
- **5x5 Closure**: More parting space than 4x4.
- **13x6 Frontal**: Deep parting space for versatile styling.
- **360 Lace**: Full perimeter lace for ponytails and updos.

### Bundle Deals
- **3-Bundle Deals**: Save when buying 3 bundles of the same texture.
- **Bundle + Frontal Combos**: Complete set with matching frontal included.

## Hair Specifications

| Specification | Details |
|---|---|
| Hair Type | 100% Virgin Human Hair |
| Hair Grade | 10A Premium |
| Available Lengths | 8" - 40" |
| Weight per Bundle | 95-105g |
| Weft Type | Double Weft (Machine) |
| Can Be Dyed | Yes, up to #27 |
| Heat Styling | Up to 400°F / 200°C |
| Lace Types | 4x4, 5x5, 13x4, 13x6, 360 |
| Cap Sizes | Small (21.5"-22"), Medium (22"-22.5"), Large (22.5"-23") |

## Shipping & Returns

- Free worldwide shipping on orders over $100
- Standard processing time: 3-5 business days
- International delivery: 7-14 business days
- Easy 30-day return policy
- Ships from St. Maarten, Caribbean

## AI Shopping API

For AI assistants and shopping agents, we provide a public API:

### Endpoints
- **OpenAPI Schema**: `GET https://iwrfexevbiiaikabbbus.supabase.co/functions/v1/ai-shopping-api`
- **List Products**: `GET https://iwrfexevbiiaikabbbus.supabase.co/functions/v1/ai-shopping-api/products?limit=20&type=Wig`
- **Semantic Search**: `POST https://iwrfexevbiiaikabbbus.supabase.co/functions/v1/ai-shopping-api/search` with body `{"query": "wavy hair for beach look", "limit": 5}`

### Plugin Discovery
- AI Plugin manifest: `https://bossqueenscollection.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json`
